title: pouteria gutta
intro: Pouteria gutta, also known as the Borneo rosewood or Kamana, is a tropical tree species native to Malaysia and Indonesia. The tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The extracts from Pouteria gutta have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Pouteria gutta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
